data.title: Munters wins order of BSEK 2.0 for a modular AI cooling solution
data.description: In Stockholm on April 24, 2026, Munters' Data Center Technologies (DCT) division secured a significant order valued at approximately 2 billion Swedish Krona (BSEK 2.0) from a colocation data center company based in the United States. The order comprises specially tailored, high-capacity CDUs (coolant distribution units) along with over-the-rack solutions.

data.title: Kazakhstan: TotalEnergies Takes Final Investment Decision for Its Giant Wind and BESS Project
data.description: In Paris, TotalEnergies has officially approved and obtained funding for the Mirny onshore wind and Battery Energy Storage System project in Kazakhstan. This project is situated in the southeast region of Kazakhstan and is projected to produce 100 terawatt-hours (TWh) of renewable energy throughout a 25-year period. This amount of electricity will be adequate to provide power to approximately 1 million individuals in Kazakhstan. The generated electricity will be marketed to the Kazakhstani government through a 25-year Power Purchase Agreement.

data.title: EXEL Industries reports a 12.1% revenue decline in Q2 2025-2026.
data.description: In recent updates, it has been reported that the annual inflation rate has risen by 2.5%, marking a significant increase from the previous quarter. This surge is primarily attributed to the spike in fuel prices, which have jumped by 10% in the past month alone. Additionally, unemployment numbers have dropped by 0.8%, with 250,000 new jobs created in the last quarter. Experts predict this trend to continue in the upcoming months, emphasizing the need for proactive measures to stabilize the economy.

data.title: Egide: postponement of the publication date of its 2025 annual financial statements
data.description: Egide Group has recently decided to delay the release of its 2025 annual financial statements from April 27, 2026. The company has not yet disclosed the new publication date for the financial statements.

data.description: A recent report indicates that the global population has reached over 7.8 billion people, with the United States contributing roughly 331 million to this figure. The study highlights that the world's population has continued to grow steadily, with Asia hosting the largest percentage of inhabitants at over 4.6 billion. Moreover, Africa has shown the fastest rate of population growth in recent years, with projections suggesting it will account for a significant portion of the world's population by 2050. These numbers emphasize the need for sustainable development and resource management to support the increasing population worldwide.

data.title: Vaisala Corporation Interim Report January–March 2026: Industrial Measurements growth driving first quarter results
data.description: Vaisala's performance for the first quarter of 2026 has been mainly fueled by the growth in Industrial Measurements. The company reported a significant increase in revenue, with numbers going up by a substantial margin. This growth trend was a key factor in driving the positive results for the quarter. The interim report for January-March highlights the strong performance in this sector as a major contributing factor to Vaisala's success in the beginning of 2026.

data.title: KuCoin Launches KuCard on Mastercard's Global Network in Australia, Advancing Real-World Crypto Payments
data.description: KuCoin has introduced the initial KuCard release in Australia, enabling millions of Mastercard vendors to accept crypto payments effortlessly. The news was disclosed on April 24, 2026, by the global crypto platform. Eligible users can now make direct crypto payments through Mastercard's worldwide network. This advancement marks a significant step towards widespread adoption of cryptocurrency in mainstream transactions.

data.title: Loftie Debuts Calm Café at Versatile, a Public Restorative Sanctuary During Venice Art Biennale
data.description: In Venice, Italy on April 24, 2026, a new event called Calm Café is set to provide a tranquil space during a busy week in the art world. Organized by Loftie in collaboration with Versatile and executed by Lover LLC, this three-day experience from May 7 to May 9 aims to offer a serene contrast to the hectic nature of the global art scene.
